rumor.detail: Motaung Jnr contacted Mngqithi; greenlight to leave Arrows per prior agreement

newIntel.reasoning: Latest rumor dated May 27, 2026. This May 29 report represents new escalation: direct contact by Chiefs SD Motaung Jnr to Mngqithi, moving beyond prior 'no formal approach' status to confirmed contact and greenlight agreement. Passes date gate and represents genuinely new development.

rumor.detail: Transfer deal signed and sealed; move away from Golden Arrows confirmed officially

newIntel.reasoning: Latest existing rumor dated Jun 10, 2026 ('deal signed and sealed'). Research confirms official unveiling by Orlando Pirates with multiple YouTube sources from 1-2 weeks ago showing official unveiling. This escalates from 'confirmed' (Jun 10) to 'official' with club announcement evidence. Most recent development.
